title: Fun Zone
description: FunZone is a lightweight, web-based social gaming hub that bridges the gap between real-time community interaction and instant gameplay. Built with React, Supabase, and Vercel, it offers a seamless install-free experience where users can manage profiles, connect with friends, and engage in real-time chat while exploring a curated game catalog. It is designed to provide a secure and high-performance ecosystem for casual gamers to hang out and play together directly from any browser.

title: Base 64 Encode & Decode
description: A React-based Base64 Encoder/Decoder with multiple security modes: Normal, password-protected Secondary, and key-based Secure mode using XOR encryption. Supports text conversion, file upload/download, and session management. Built with React, Vite, and Tailwind CSS, featuring a clean UI with clipboard, validation, and quick reset tools.

title: BSR Calculator
description: BSR Resource Planner is a React and TypeScript-based progress calculator application designed to optimize precise Character, Weapon, and Skill resource management. Built with an efficient Global State Management architecture and optimized business logic through memoized hooks, the application offers intelligent calculation features such as mixed material recommendations and a Total Planner for cumulative material requirement estimation. With support for Vite, Modular CSS, and a responsive UX for mobile and desktop, this project provides a fast, lightweight, and synchronous planning experience for users to manage their farming strategy.

title: Voca Store
description: Voca Plane is a robust full-stack flight booking application built with a modern architecture featuring a Go-powered backend and a Next.js frontend. The platform offers a seamless end-to-end travel experience, allowing users to search for flights, select specific seats through an interactive interface, and complete secure transactions integrated with the Midtrans payment gateway. Complementing the user-facing features is a comprehensive administrative dashboard that enables real-time management of airlines, flight schedules, airports, and promotional offers. By leveraging a high-performance tech stack including GORM, PostgreSQL, and TanStack Query, Voca Plane delivers a fast, reliable, and scalable solution for digital aviation commerce.

title: Clavis
description: Clavis Wordboard is a next-generation social media platform designed for Gen Z that transforms trending digital conversations into dynamic, interactive word clouds. Built with a Neonverse cyberpunk aesthetic, the platform gamifies social interaction by scaling words based on real-time popularity and rewarding users with XP and badges for their engagement. By combining a high-performance tech stack of Laravel 12, React, and Framer Motion, Clavis Wordboard offers a cinematic and visually immersive experience where users can explore live topics, track their personal influence, and watch global discussions pulse with life.
